x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Unscheduled CIs generate false-positive alerts during patching and maintenance. These noise events pollute the alert corpus Now Assist uses for pattern recognition, degrading AI event grouping accuracy.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure maintenance schedules for planned downtime via cmn_schedule_maintenance_list.do. Associate schedules with relevant CIs. Maintenance windows suppress false-positive alerts that would otherwise pollute the Now Assist ITOM event correlation training corpus.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_baf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c04
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Unscheduled CIs generate false-positive alerts during patching and maintenance. These noise events pollute the alert corpus Now Assist uses for pattern recognition, degrading AI event grouping accuracy.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Maintenance Window Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('cmn_schedule_maintenance');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var schedules = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = schedules + ' active maintenance schedules defined';

    if (schedules >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: schedules + ' active maintenance schedules. Planned downtime is controlled — Now Assist ITOM event correlation training signal is protected from false-positive alert pollution.'
        };
    } else if (schedules >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + schedules + ' active maintenance schedule(s) (target: 5+). Unscheduled maintenance events will generate false-positive alerts that degrade Now Assist ITOM AI correlation accuracy.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active maintenance schedules defined. Unscheduled maintenance generates false-positive alerts that pollute the Now Assist ITOM event correlation training corpus.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITOM</module><number>CHK0000370</number><order>170</order><remediation_guidance>Configure maintenance schedules for planned downtime via cmn_schedule_maintenance_list.do. Associate schedules with relevant CIs. Maintenance windows suppress false-positive alerts that would otherwise pollute the Now Assist ITOM event correlation training corpus.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>baf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c04</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Maintenance Window Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_baf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c04</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
